releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.1.7

新功能
- 新增 RocketMQ 数据源支持（4.x ~ 5.x）
  - Topic 列表浏览，自动过滤系统 Topic
  - 消息查看：按队列拉取消息，解析消息体、属性、时间戳等完整信息
  - 消费组管理：消费组列表及消费进度查看，自动过滤系统消费组
  - 独立 RocketMQ 工作台，支持代理自动回退
  - 元数据同步自动发现 Topic 并建立全文搜索索引
  - 搜索结果跳转工作台，支持从全局搜索直达指定 Topic

修复
- 修复 MySQL/PostgreSQL/OceanBase 工作台 SELECT 查询含 update_time 等列名时误报「禁止执行写操作」的问题

优化
- 首页统计卡片将 Kafka Topic 和 RocketMQ Topic 合并为统一的「消息主题」展示
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.1.7

New Features
- RocketMQ datasource support (4.x ~ 5.x)
  - Topic list browsing with automatic system topic filtering
  - Message viewing: pull messages by queue, parse message body, properties, timestamps
  - Consumer group management: list and consumption progress, auto-filter system groups
  - Dedicated RocketMQ workspace with proxy auto-fallback
  - Metadata sync auto-discovers topics and builds full-text search index
  - Search results link to workspace, navigate directly to a specific topic

Bug Fixes
- Fixed false positive 'write operations forbidden' error in MySQL/PostgreSQL/OceanBase workspaces when SELECT queries contain column names like update_time

Improvements
- Homepage stats cards merge Kafka topics and RocketMQ topics into unified 'Message Topics' display
